data.description:
Tracks remediation of the joe-janitor audit `.joe-janitor/report-2026-06-27.md` (delta vs 2026-06-24). Overall health is good and improving — no temporal decay, most prior top findings already fixed, security re-verified strong, and the LLM-disabled isolation story passes empirically. This epic scopes ONLY the requested subset.

## Context
Audit headline: the LLM workflow can be disabled / its deps absent and all client-facing ticket workflows still function (verified by a `sys.meta_path` import-blocker experiment); both LLM gates fail closed with clean, actionable errors. The remaining debt is structural. This epic does not attempt to fix every Medium finding.

Deliberately OUT OF SCOPE (left in the report for separate triage): the workflow→plan_review back-edge + false "cycle-free" comment's structural fix, the `review_ticket` legacy/workflow shadow runner, the `drift_refresh` bespoke pass-driver, the `orchestrator.py` re-export shim, the `graph↔_commands` lazy cycle, and the `_engine.py`/`_engine/` name collision.

## Success Criteria
- All four requested buckets land as PRs merged to `main`, each child closed through the completion-verifier gate.
- No regression in the `optionality.yml` lean-install lane or the security posture (semgrep clean).
- Every large-file split lands along the LOGICAL SEAMS named in its child ticket — no mechanical line-count splitting, no new file < 100 LOC.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Bucket 1 (low-effort/low-risk wins): doc & comment accuracy fixes merged.
- [ ] Bucket 2 (client UX / reliability): library `force_close` parity; caller LLMConfig honored in gate ops; plan-review graph re-assembly eliminated.
- [ ] Bucket 3 (top-3 risks): exception taxonomy unified (OSS-informed) + prompt write-backend consolidated; `outbound_differ.py`/`applier.py`/`prompts.py` split along seams; `reconcile_once()` decomposed in-place.
- [ ] Bucket 4 (E2E config tests): F1/F2/F3 gaps covered without duplicating gate-logic tests.
- [ ] `outbound_differ.py` and `prompts.py` drop OFF `.github/module-size-allowlist.txt` after their splits.
data.title: Codebase-health remediation — 2026-06-27 audit
